items.name_cn:
Top Quality
【Top Grade】🎉New Three-in-One🎉1B is here👏 This mini envelope bag features a front flap, with the iconic engraved logo embellishing the front, showcasing the brand's style. The magnetic closure design remains classic, and the woven strap transforms it into a crossbody or shoulder bag, paired with a small coin purse for versatile functionality and use as a clutch😘😘 The soft lambskin lining features a small pocket with a detachable mirror, a thoughtful design. Simple and stylish, ladies hurry up and get one🎉🎉🎉👏
Size: L20xH12xW4cm!

items.name_cn:
Top Quality
(Box Included)🌟Hobo Three-in-One Faux Fur Bag
The autumn/winter vibe is just one faux fur bag away❄️ This bag comes with a detachable faux fur shoulder strap and chain, adding a touch of sexiness when worn as an armpit bag. It also features a detachable long strap, allowing those who love a sporty-sexy look to crossbody it for an effortless silhouette. Highly functional, a winter essential!!
Size: L22*H18*W6cm
Style: 1BC204
